name: Risotto Pomodoro (Rice and Tomatoes)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Uncooked arborio rice (or any short- or medium-grain rice)
1 Packet instant chicken broth and seasoning mix, dissolved in 1 cup hot water
1 Medium Tomato, blanched, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, heat the margarine until bubbly and hot.
2. Add onion and garlic and sauté until onion is soft (do not brown).
3. Add rice and cook, stirring frequently, until golden, about 3 minutes.
4. Stir in 1/4 cup of the dissolved broth mixture and cover the skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat until rice begins to absorb liquid, about 3 minutes (watch carefully so that rice does not burn).
6. Stir in tomato, salt, pepper, and about 1/4 cup more broth; cover skillet and cook, checking frequently, until liquid has been almost absorbed.
7. Continue cooking and adding broth as described until rice is tender but still moist, about 15 minutes (be careful that rice does not dry out completely).
8. Makes 4 servings.
